description: Message-arm without an accepts= declaration (§51.0.S.2.3 / §51.0.S.4). <Closed> declares a (state × message) arm `| .Toggle :> .Open`, but the engine opener has no accepts= attribute. E-ENGINE-MSG-WITHOUT-ACCEPTS fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.S.2.3 a state-child that declares a (state × message) arm while the engine opener has NO accepts= fires E-ENGINE-MSG-WITHOUT-ACCEPTS.
